Token derivation method.question: How should the 50–900 shade scales be generated from each logo anchor?
Token derivation method.answer: OKLCH lightness sweep — hold chroma + hue, sweep lightness across 50–900; store final hex literals in globals.css.

Token derivation method.question: Where does the derivation actually run — ad-hoc in dev, or a checked-in script?
Token derivation method.answer: Checked-in Node script at scripts/derive-tokens.ts — reproducible; re-runs on anchor change.

Token derivation method.question: How is the SPEC ΔE76 ≤ 2 acceptance enforced?
Token derivation method.answer: Manual verify once + comment in globals.css; no CI test (tests are deferred this milestone).

Brand-spec authorship.question: Who writes .planning/brand/SPEC.md (5 sections each ending in **Decision:**)?
Brand-spec authorship.answer: Claude synthesizes from the logo personality + Graza/Monte Cafe/Craft/Superr DNA per PROJECT.md; user reviews and edits each Decision: line in place.

Brand-spec authorship.question: When in Phase 1 does the brand spec land relative to token + component work?
Brand-spec authorship.answer: Brand spec FIRST — Typography Decision: feeds typography tokens; Motion Decision: feeds motion tokens. Locks design intent before code.

Brand-spec authorship.question: What anchors does each Decision: cite to stay grounded?
Brand-spec authorship.answer: PROJECT.md DNA refs (Graza / Monte Cafe / Craft / Superr) plus 1 inline image link per pillar. Evidence-based and short.
options_presented: PROJECT.md DNA refs + 1 image per pillar

note: Discuss-phase paused mid-flight by user request to commit + open PR. Resume with /gsd-discuss-phase 1 — the workflow detects this checkpoint and offers to continue from 'Component variants strategy'.
